sentences.arabic: أَرَادَ عُمَرُ أَنْ يُسَجِّلَ صَوْتَ أَبِيهِ.
sentences.translation: Omer je htio snimiti očev glas.
sentences.translationEn: Omar wanted to record his father's voice.

sentences.arabic: فَتَحَ تَطْبِيقَ التَّسْجِيلِ وَطَلَبَ مِنْ أَبِيهِ أَنْ يَتَكَلَّمَ.
sentences.translation: Otvorio je aplikaciju za snimanje i zamolilo oca da govori.
sentences.translationEn: He opened the recording app and asked his father to speak.

sentences.arabic: سَجَّلَ صَوْتَ أَبِيهِ وَهُوَ يَرْوِي قِصَّةً قَدِيمَةً.
sentences.translation: Snimio je očev glas dok priča staru priču.
sentences.translationEn: He recorded his father's voice as he told an old story.

sentences.arabic: حَفِظَ التَّسْجِيلَ لِيَسْتَمِعَ إِلَيْهِ كُلَّمَا أَرَادَ.
sentences.translation: Sačuvao je snimak da ga sluša kad god želi.
sentences.translationEn: He saved the recording to listen to it whenever he wanted.
